phonetic: 藢瑟mp蓹藢t蓽藧b蓹藞b瑟l蓹ti
phoneticUs: 藢瑟mp蓹r藢t蓽藧rb蓹藞b瑟l蓹ti
meaning: n.娌夌潃,鍐烽潤,缂轰箯鐑儏
examples: You must want imperturbability more than you want approval, control and security.
STEP 1: You must want imperturbability or freedom more than you want approval, control and security.
Release more and more and become happier and lighter, until you move beyond happiness into imperturbability and freedom.
